registered.name: Spectral Interference
registered.creator: Xponential
registered.tags: abstract, landscape, seamless, loop, rgb, fluid, topography, trichromatic
registered.features: __availability_: primary, Color: RGB, Loop: Seamless, System: Procedural
registered.description:
A river of spectral interference flows through an impossible landscape. RGB contours twist into liquid strata, dissolving the boundary between geometry and fluid, between signal and matter.  The seamless loop becomes an endless cycle of emergence, where color itself behaves like a living substance, continuously folding, stretching, and reforming without beginning or end.

created on July 9th 2026

After Effect Source File:
https://www.patreon.com/xponentialdesign/posts/spectral-after-163840048

840p-30frames-15fps-15mb

This is an invitation to visit the ongoing Trippy "Landscape Surfaces" collection:
https://objkt.com/collections/KT1AFNdbaJbRTZ9yHSWheY3Gs9yMerAgbSan
registered.reason: The work presents a sophisticated procedural exploration of fluid topography and RGB geometry, successfully dissolving the boundary between signal and organic form. Its conceptual focus on endless emergence through a seamless, mathematically-driven loop aligns perfectly with generative abstraction.
registered.f2_verdict: A hypnotic exploration of fluid dynamics that successfully bridges the gap between digital signal and organic movement.
registered.f2_reasoning: The work demonstrates a sophisticated command of parametric flow, utilizing RGB color separation to create a sense of depth and structural interference. The seamless loop reinforces the conceptual weight of an endless, self-organizing system, moving beyond mere decorative noise into a cohesive, rhythmic visual language.

registered.name: Parallax 002
registered.creator: Chris Follows
registered.tags: gif, painting, code, p5js, mesh, chrisfollows, meshpainting
registered.description: Parallax Mesh Painting by Chris Follows, created using p5.js with AI code assistance.
registered.reason: The piece utilizes p5.js to create an algorithmic mesh painting, demonstrating a clear procedural and generative approach to digital abstraction.
registered.f2_verdict: A compelling synthesis of algorithmic structure and nostalgic iconography that elevates the mesh-painting medium.
registered.f2_reasoning: The work demonstrates a clear technical intention by utilizing p5.js to translate a recognizable domestic scene into a disciplined, point-based mesh system. The interplay between the rigid grid and the chaotic, vibrant color clusters within the monitor creates a sophisticated tension between order and digital noise.

registered.name: D̶̻͝á̶̯t̷̡̂a̶̚͜b̵̤́a̷͍̿n̶͈͂k̷͎̈́
registered.creator: Kamau Kamau
registered.description:
Final 1/1 from this algorithm :)

Generative art made with p5js
by Kamau Kamau (2026)
registered.reason: The work leverages p5.js to algorithmically generate glitch aesthetics, indicating a procedural approach to digital error rather than a superficial filter. The thematic focus on data structures aligns well with the curatorial criteria for structural manipulation.
registered.f2_verdict: A compelling synthesis of algorithmic structure and glitch-inflected aesthetics that pushes the boundaries of p5.js composition.
registered.f2_reasoning: The work demonstrates a sophisticated use of p5.js to create a structured, non-representational composition that mimics the visual language of data corruption. By integrating deliberate pixel-level degradation into a generative framework, the artist successfully bridges the gap between systemic order and entropic chaos.
